wpPortfolio.title: Holistic Wellness Products & Services Marketplace
wpPortfolio.content: emQube launched a modern Shopify e-commerce portal to provide a unified marketplace for wellness products and services.

softwarePortfolioLayout.aboutApplication:
Implemented on Shopify, this e-commerce portal serves customers looking for physical wellness goods, such as healthy snacks and drinks, as well as digital services like specialized wellness recipes. The site acts as a central hub, enabling the brand to sell services from various partner wellness centers alongside their own products.


The platform is configured to handle multiple payment methods, ensuring a frictionless customer experience. By combining physical products with service offerings in a single marketplace, the site provides a scalable and modern platform that positions the brand as a key player in the Dubai wellness space.
softwarePortfolioLayout.clientName: Arweness, a trendy, wellness-focused brand based in Dubai.
softwarePortfolioLayout.testimonialContent: Shopify was the right choice for our brand, and emQube made the implementation very smooth. We now have a central hub that perfectly manages both our physical products and our wellness services.
